features: FULLY WIRED 21‑PIN SCART CABLE: Ensures reliable audio and video connectivity between devices including TVs, DVD players, VCRs, set‑top boxes or gaming consoles.
GOLD‑PLATED CONNECTORS FOR OPTIMAL SIGNAL: Resist corrosion and enhance signal fidelity for clear picture and sound quality over prolonged use.
2 M LONG CABLE WITH 7 mm OD: Offers flexibility for placing devices at comfortable distances. The slim 7 mm diameter balances durability with ease of routing and cable management.
CE CERTIFIED AND ECO‑FRIENDLY: Constructed from recyclable materials and certified to CE safety standards for environmentally considerate and compliant use.
POLYBAG PACKAGING IN CDU: Supplied in simple, space-saving packaging ready for retail display or bulk stocking, with compact presentation in a counter display unit.
description: Product Description Status 21 pin scart gold plated connector cable. Ideal quality and value for money scart lead. Quality replacement scart lead for your universal home theatre. Recyclable materials. Comes with poly bag packaging in a white counter display unit (CDU). CE certified. 7 mm OD x 2 m L. Box Contains 1x 21 Pin Scart Connector Cable
